title: Intelligent Transportation Systems Joint Program Office
description: The Intelligent Transportation Systems Joint Program Office (ITS JPO) seeks to transform the way society moves. Explore our website for information on research and deployments that advance the use of ITS to move people and goods more safely and efficiently.
